# Best Dad Jokes

> Best Dad Jokes is a free iOS app with 5,000+ dad jokes across 20+ categories. Features daily featured jokes, AI-generated personalized jokes using your name, custom themes, and push notifications. Available at dadjokes.vip and on the iOS App Store.

## App
- [Download on iOS](https://apps.apple.com/app/best-dad-jokes/id6743726261): Free on the App Store
- [About](https://dadjokes.vip/app/): Features, screenshots, and download links

## Joke Categories
- [All Categories](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/): Browse 20+ joke categories
- [#DadLife](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/dadlife/): Parenting and family life humor
- [Wife](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/wife/): Lighthearted marriage humor
- [Family](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/family/): Wholesome family relationship jokes
- [Words & Puns](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/words-puns/): Clever wordplay and puns
- [Around the House](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/around-the-house/): Home life and household humor
- [Food](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/food/): Food and cooking puns
- [Animals](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/animals/): Animal dad jokes
- [Work & Money](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/work-money/): Office and workplace humor
- [Sports & Games](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/sports-games/): Athletic humor and competition jokes
- [Transportation](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/transportation/): Cars, planes, trains, and travel jokes
- [Movies](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/movies/): Hollywood and cinema humor
- [Music & Arts](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/music-arts/): Musical and artistic humor
- [Medical](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/medical/): Doctor jokes and medical humor
- [Science & Tech](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/science-tech/): Science and technology humor
- [Global](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/global/): International and geography humor
- [Clothing](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/clothing/): Fashion and wardrobe jokes
- [People](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/people/): Personality and profession jokes
- [History](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/history/): Historical humor
- [Religion](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/religion/): Lighthearted religious humor
- [Mother Nature](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/mother-nature/): Weather, plants, and outdoor jokes
- [Seasonal](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/seasonal/): Holiday and seasonal jokes
- [Name Jokes](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes/name-jokes/): AI-generated personalized name jokes

## Data
- [Jokes JSON Feed](https://dadjokes.vip/jokes.json): Structured joke data
- [Category Data](https://dadjokes.vip/category_data.json): Category metadata

## Support
- [Privacy Policy](https://dadjokes.vip/privacy/): How we handle your data
- [Support](https://dadjokes.vip/support/): Contact and help
- [FAQ](https://dadjokes.vip/app/#faq): Frequently asked questions
